One of the baskets came damaged. It was very difficult to get help from the seller. I did everything the seller asked for....pictures. There was a huge delay between my messages and his responses. Without Etsy's intervention, I would have lost my money. Seller wanted me to send the damaged basket back to him at my expense. I declined. He offered a partial refund. I actually just wanted the baskets I paid for. They were out of stock. We went round and round for weeks before I got a full refund. The items were not packed well. I would not buy from this seller again.

PS. This is the only bad review I have ever written for any Etsy purchase and I have purchased many, many items over the years.
